---
title: MRAN is shutting down - Posit Package Manager to the rescue except if you need
  macOS binary packages!
author: Package Build
date: '2023-01-16'
slug: mran-is-shutting-down
categories:
  - Blog
tags:
  - R
  - CRAN
subtitle: ''
summary: ''
authors: []
lastmod: '2023-01-14T17:55:36Z'
featured: no
image:
  caption: ''
  focal_point: 'Center'
  preview_only: no
projects: []
---
